items.rationale: Structural reference to SKILL.md but Pass B's mechanical search did not verify; provisional Tier 1 / skill-section.

items.rationale: Structural reference to SKILL.md but Pass B's mechanical search did not verify; provisional Tier 1 / skill-section.
